name: Genoise - Great Chefs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Melt the butter over low heat and set it aside.
3. Mix the eggs and sugar together in a double boiler, stirring constantly by hand until the sugar has dissolved and the mixture is lukewarm. Beat the mixture for about 5 minutes using a mixer on high speed until tripled in volume and pale ivory in color.
4. Sift the flour twice. Gradually sift the flour over the mixture, folding it gently into the batter.
5. Add the cooled butter and fold gently but quickly.
6. Butter and flour the sides and bottoms of two 9-inch springform pans. Pour the batter into the pans.
7. Bake in a 350°F oven for about 20 minutes. Remove the cakes from the pans and cool on racks.
Preparation time: 1 1/2 hours
